title: fzf
html:
fzf

Command Execution

Commands can be issued via POST requests, for example: ``` curl http://localhost:12345 -d 'execute(/path/to/command)' ```

fzf --listen=12345

Shell

Press `Enter` to receive the shell.

fzf --bind 'enter:execute(/bin/sh)'
